items.title: Trump reinstates Iran port blockade and imposes 20% charge on cargo passing through Hormuz
items.summary: The US president also says Washington will impose a 20% charge on all cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Briton tells of surviving Spain wildfire in car as wife and friends died trying to run to safety
items.summary: Malcolm Timbrell's wife and their friends are thought to have died when a devastating wildfire tore through their village in Spain.

items.title: At least 28 killed, 25 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
items.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美國恢復封鎖伊朗港口　軍方公布執行時間
items.summary: 美國軍方表示，美國將於明天開始恢復對伊朗港口封鎖行動。  法新社報導，美軍中央司令部（CENTCOM）在聲明中說，美軍「將於美東時間7月14日下午4時（台灣時間15日上午4時）恢復封鎖進出伊...…

items.title: 匈牙利國會通過修憲案　要求總統簽署結束任期
items.summary: 匈牙利國會今天通過一項憲法修正案，目標是罷黜總統蘇尤克（Tamas Sulyok），現任總理馬格雅（Peter Magyar）稱他為前總理奧班（Viktor Orban）的「傀儡」。  路透...…

items.title: 美12州提反托拉斯訴訟　阻派拉蒙收購華納兄弟探索
items.summary: 美國加州和11個州今天提起訴訟，尋求阻止派拉蒙天舞以1100億美元（約新台幣3.5兆元）收購華納兄弟探索，稱這項好萊塢史上最大併購案對影視產業競爭構成威脅。  法新社報導，這項訴訟在加州北部...…
